perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a plaid flat cap, glasses, and a grey sweatshirt with 'Est. 1973' printed on it is speaking directly to the camera against a neutral grey wall. (2) He uses active hand gestures to emphasize points, while dynamic text overlays and graphics regarding influenza and Japan travel appear around him. (3) The scene cuts between his talking face and full-screen infographics detailing insurance policies and medical coverage charts. (4) Logos of various insurance companies are displayed as he lists them. (5) He continues to gesture while explaining application procedures, ending with a call-to-action tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background track plays continuously. A male voice speaks in a clear, energetic, and professional Mandarin tone. (2) As various graphics appear, subtle 'pop' or 'swoosh' sound effects are used for transition emphasis. (3) The vocal delivery remains consistent in volume and speed throughout the duration, maintaining a steady narrative flow until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles at the bottom translating the spoken Mandarin into Traditional Chinese. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large bold characters appear saying '想去日本' (Want to go to Japan) and '但疫苗打不到怎麼辦!?' (But what if I can't get the vaccine!?) to hook the audience. (3) Informative Text: List of insurance companies such as '安達產物', '台灣產物', '旺旺友聯', '南山人壽'. (4) Highlight Text: '100%全部理賠' (100% full compensation) and '5天內' (Within 5 days) used to emphasize key terms.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Explaining travel risks -> Insurance solutions -> Specific company recommendations -> Benefit breakdown -> Outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥) appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a patterned flat cap, clear-framed glasses, a grey sweatshirt, and a beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, solid light-grey studio wall providing a neutral backdrop for the speaker.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, soft and even.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Definition -> Solution Recommendations -> Practical Application -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an informative guide for travelers from Taiwan planning to visit Japan. It specifically addresses concerns about illness (flu/COVID) during travel and recommends travel insurance policies that cover legal infectious diseases. It lists reputable insurance companies and explains the benefit of 'cashless' medical treatment, where the insurance pays the hospital directly, reducing the financial burden on the traveler.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The prominent 'miko' logo in the upper corner throughout the video and the specific recommendation of several insurance providers.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim哥's signature flat cap and studio talking-head format with heavy Traditional Chinese motion graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is tailored for a specific niche of cross-border travelers during the post-pandemic recovery phase, focusing on practical risk management and financial security while abroad.
